title: The Telescope That's Falling Back to Earth

scenes.text: A vital telescope is now in danger of re-entry!
NASA’s TESS telescope is losing altitude and could soon crash.
Previous NASA missions experienced similar re-entries, raising concerns.
Could we lose vital astronomical data?
scenes.label: DATA LOSS AT RISK

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: NASA's TESS telescope is at risk of re-entering Earth's atmosphere! Discover the implications this has for our understanding of the universe. Follow for more incredible science updates!
